stories.headline: ChatGPT's new voice mode learned when to stop talking
stories.blurb: OpenAI released GPT-Live-1, a voice model that interrupts less and waits through your pauses instead of jumping in. The company says it feels more like talking to a person than the current voice mode, which tends to cut you off mid-thought.
stories.why_it_matters: Voice AI that knows when you're pausing versus done makes it actually usable for thinking out loud.
stories.original_headline: ChatGPT’s upgraded voice mode is better at shutting up

stories.headline: Meta's new AI can put your Instagram friends into generated photos
stories.blurb: Meta just launched Muse Image, its first model from the new Superintelligence Labs division. It now powers AI image generation across Meta AI, Instagram, and WhatsApp, with Facebook and Messenger coming soon. The standout feature: you can reference other Instagram users and the AI will incorporate them into generated images.
stories.why_it_matters: AI image generation just got social — your friends are now creative assets.
stories.original_headline: Meta’s new Muse Image model can pull other Instagram users into AI photos

stories.headline: xAI ships Grok 4.5, calling it a cheaper rival to Claude Opus
stories.blurb: Elon Musk's xAI released Grok 4.5 on Wednesday, positioning it as a more affordable alternative to top-tier models like Anthropic's Claude Opus. The company claims the new version delivers comparable performance at lower cost, though independent benchmarks haven't yet confirmed those claims.
stories.why_it_matters: Another frontier model enters the ring, potentially pressuring pricing across the industry
stories.original_headline: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’

stories.headline: Ollama just raised $65M to help devs run AI models locally
stories.blurb: The open-source tool that lets you run LLMs on your own machine—no cloud required—now has 9 million users and 176,000 GitHub stars. Benchmark led the round. Ollama makes it dead simple to download and run models like Llama or Mistral locally, which is why nearly 17,000 developers have forked it.
stories.why_it_matters: Local AI is going mainstream—developers want models they can run and customize without API calls.
stories.original_headline: Popular open source AI developer tool Ollama raises $65M, grows to nearly 9M users

try_this_prompt.title: The strategy stress test
try_this_prompt.prompt: I'll describe our current strategy below. Assume our top competitor just hired someone brilliant who sees exactly what we're doing. Write their internal memo explaining how they'd make our approach irrelevant in 18 months — then tell me which part of that memo worries you most.
try_this_prompt.tool_hint: Before you commit the next quarter to a plan that only works if nobody notices.
